title: Wagi's Furry Villager - Compats
description: Changes the appearance of villagers from mod, zombie villagers, and wandering traders into cute animals.
body:
# English Description
## About
This resource pack enables [Wagi's Furry Villager](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wagis-furry-villager)'s villagers to work with professions and merchants added by mods.  
This resource pack requires [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), and [Wagi's Furry Villager](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wagis-furry-villager) to function.
## Compatible Mods
- [Chef's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/chefs-delight)
  - Cook
  - Chef
- [CozyStudios Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozystudios-core)
  - Arborist
  - Mystical Trader
- [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
  - Beekeeper
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
  - Red Merchant
- [VillagersPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagersplus)
  - Horticulturist
  - Occultist
  - Oceanographer
  - Alchemist
- [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery)
  - Wandering Winemaker
- [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers)
  - Guard
- [Kaleidoscope Cookery](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleidoscope-cookery)
  - Chef

Live development on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/ktwg31).  
Update information is available on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@ktwg31).

---
# Japanese Description
## このリソースパックについて
[Wagi's Furry Villager](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wagis-furry-villager)の村人を、Modで追加された職業や行商人に対応させるリソースパックです。  
このリソースパックを動作させるには、[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)と [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)、[Wagi's Furry Villager](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wagis-furry-villager)を必要とします。
## 対応しているMod
- [Chef's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/chefs-delight)
  - Cook
  - Chef
- [CozyStudios Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/cozystudios-core)
  - Arborist
  - Mystical Trader
- [Friends&Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes)
  - Beekeeper
- [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
  - Red Merchant
- [VillagersPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagersplus)
  - Horticulturist
  - Occultist
  - Oceanographer
  - Alchemist
- [[Let's Do] Vinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery)
  - Wandering Winemaker
- [Guard Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers)
  - Guard
- [Kaleidoscope Cookery](https://modrinth.com/mod/kaleidoscope-cookery)
  - Chef

制作風景は[Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/ktwg31)で配信中です。  
更新情報は[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@ktwg31)でご覧いただけます。
